smiles widened, dimples accentuated, etc

source_doc:
Whoa, you mean Blender Market, the thing I said was the first step towards the Blender environment becoming a shitty subscription service, renamed itself to the oh-so-appealing name "Superhive" and then decided to mandate subscriptions?
WHOA WHO COULD HAVE GUESSED?! Not me, that's for sure. This is completely out of left field!

TBH, I have never seen a single company with "Hive" in the name that wasn't a complete shitshow run by assholes, so I never bought anything on that platform -
Sorry
I didn't RENT anything on that platform if I could help it.
Maybe it's unfair, but "clearly we, a company that specializes in connecting creators with their audience, should name ourselves HIVE, because the creators are just our loyal little bees, and audience is our loyal little bees, work for us!" always gives me bad vibes.

"Hive implies busy crowds!"
Hive implies a queen.
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Simplified translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Simplified grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Simplified. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Simplified translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):
hypo_0:
哇哦，你是说 Blender Market，那个我早就说过是把 Blender 生态往烂订阅制服务推进的第一步的东西，改名成了那个“超级吸引人”的名字“Superhive”，然后还决定强制订阅？
哇哦，这谁能猜到啊？！反正我肯定没猜到。这可真是太“出乎意料”了！

说真的，我就没见过哪家公司名字里带“Hive”还不是一场彻头彻尾的烂摊子，而且还都是一帮傻逼在管，所以我从来没在那个平台买过任何东西——
抱歉
应该说，只要我有得选，我就不会在那个平台上“租”任何东西。
也许这么想不公平，但“很明显，我们这种专门帮创作者对接受众的公司，就该给自己起名叫 HIVE，因为创作者不过是我们忠心的小蜜蜂，受众也不过是我们忠心的小蜜蜂，来给我们干活吧！”这种感觉一直都让我很不舒服。

“Hive 让人联想到忙忙碌碌的人群！”
Hive 也让人联想到蜂后。
hypo_1:
哇，所以你的意思是，Blender Market——那个我早就说过，是把 Blender 生态一步步推向那种垃圾订阅制服务的开端——先把自己改名成那个“也太诱人了吧”的名字“Superhive”，然后又决定强制大家订阅？
哇——这谁能想到啊？！反正我肯定想不到。这可真是完全没人预料得到呢！

说真的，我就没见过哪家名字里带“Hive”的公司，不是个彻头彻尾的烂摊子，而且还是混蛋在管，所以我从来没在那个平台上买过任何东西——
抱歉
应该说，只要我能避免，我就不会在那个平台上“租”任何东西。
也许这么说不太公平，但“很明显啊，我们这种专门把创作者和受众连起来的公司，就该叫 HIVE，因为创作者就是我们忠心耿耿的小蜜蜂，受众也是我们忠心耿耿的小蜜蜂，统统来给我们干活！”这种感觉一直都让我很不舒服。

“Hive 会让人联想到忙忙碌碌的人群！”
Hive 也会让人联想到蜂后。

哇哦，这谁能猜到啊？！反正我肯定猜不到。这发展也太“出乎意料”了吧！

说真的，我就没见过哪家名字里带“Hive”的公司，不是由混蛋掌舵的一地鸡毛，所以我从来没在那个平台上买过任何东西——

也许这么说不太公平，但“很显然嘛，我们这种专门连接创作者和受众的公司，就该叫 HIVE，因为创作者只是我们乖乖的小蜜蜂，受众也是我们乖乖的小蜜蜂，来，给我们干活！”这种感觉一直都让我生理性反感。

哇，所以你的意思是，Blender Market——那个我早就说过是把 Blender 生态一步步推向垃圾订阅制的第一步——先把自己改名成那个“听起来可真诱人啊”的“Superhive”，然后又决定强制大家订阅？
哇哦，这谁能想得到啊？！反正我肯定想不到。这也太莫名其妙了吧！

Just.

It's called eat your strawberries.
Also lowkey matching my outfit?
Kind of like that as well.
And the thing on them, though.
But just taking a picture to remember.
Loki attempted to get the strawberry one, though, because I feel like it's the last one left.
I mean, if I come back and it's not here, I guess it just wasn't meant to be.

source_doc:
Progress after a while off. I got the sewing machine out to do the bill and a crown seam. Half the crown sewn plus the bill, resting atop the paper form made from the pattern. I had to rip and re-sew the machine stitch because I pinned along instead of across the seam and went off track. I might re-do the bill if I want a little more depth.
#millinery

Eight crown panels and two bill panels assembled into three pieces and pinned for general shape. Sachi's Studio Newsboy Cap pattern in green velvet. Mostly machine stitched.
The pattern calls for topstitching along the seams of the crown panels, which might suggest either matching or contrasting thread.
#millinery

Top view before I sew the crown halves together. Reviewing the how-to video. I see Sachi is using a few tiny spring clips during sewing instead of pinning the whole seam.

A bit of a messy join on the eight panels coming together at the peak of the newsboy cap, so I am thinking a larger button may be in order to disguise the seams.

Crown fully pieced, with cloth covered.button at peak. Raw edges loosely tucked under. Seams neither pressed nor topstitched.
#millinery

Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Simplified. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Simplified translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):
hypo_0:
歇了一阵子之后又有进展啦。我把缝纫机搬出来做帽檐和一条帽身接缝。帽身缝好了一半，加上帽檐，正放在按纸样做出来的纸模上。我不得不把机器缝线拆了重缝，因为我把珠针顺着接缝别了，而不是横着别，结果缝歪了。如果我想让帽檐再深一点，可能会重做一下。
#制帽

八片帽身裁片和两片帽檐裁片拼成了三大块，并用珠针固定出大致形状。Sachi's Studio 的报童帽纸样，绿色天鹅绒款。大部分都是机器缝的。
纸样要求沿着帽身裁片的接缝做明线压缝，所以线的颜色可能要么配色一致，要么做撞色。
#制帽

把两半帽身缝合到一起之前的顶视图。正在重看教学视频。我看到 Sachi 缝的时候用了几个小弹簧夹，而不是把整条接缝都用珠针别起来。

八片裁片在报童帽顶部汇合的地方接得有点乱，所以我在想，也许得用个更大的纽扣来遮一下这些接缝。

帽身已经完全拼好了，顶部有一颗布包纽扣。毛边松松地收在里面。接缝还没熨开，也还没做明线压缝。
#制帽
hypo_1:
停了一阵子，终于又有点进展了。我把缝纫机拿出来，先做帽檐和一条帽身接缝。帽身缝好了一半，再加上帽檐，正搁在按纸样做出来的纸模上。我不得不把机缝线拆掉重来，因为我把珠针顺着缝线方向别了，而不是横着别，结果车缝的时候就跑偏了。如果我想让帽檐再有点深度，可能还会重做。
#制帽

八片帽身片和两片帽檐片先拼成了三大块，再用珠针固定出大致形状。用的是 Sachi's Studio 的报童帽纸样，绿色天鹅绒。大部分都是机缝。
纸样要求沿着帽身各片的接缝压明线，所以这里可能适合用同色线，也可能用撞色线。
#制帽

这是把帽身两半缝合起来之前的顶视图。正在重看教学视频。我发现 Sachi 缝的时候用了几个小小的弹簧夹，而不是把整条缝都别满珠针。

报童帽顶部八片拼到一起的地方接得有点乱，所以我在想，也许该用一颗大一点的纽扣，把这些接缝遮一遮。

帽身已经全部拼好了，顶部加了一颗包布纽扣。毛边只是松松地收到了里面。接缝还没熨烫定型，也还没压明线。
#制帽

You guys ready for breakfast?
Yeah, yeah, yeah.
I think there are people underneath.
You didn't go to sleep till 2:00.
I'm a sad little puppy.
Oh.
It wasn't because we were bothering each other.
It's because the bunk was uncomfortable.
Okay.
It was comfortable for me.
Ellie, what are you doing?
It was weird.
Yeah, it was a weird night.
Are you trying to sneak the snacks?

source_doc:
My brother in He-Who-Shall-Not-Be-Named, what you are describing is a consequence of _misogyny_, not "misandry."

I desperately need men to realize that just because it's directed at them and an actual serious problem doesn't mean it is "misandry."
Just saw someone describe being discriminated against _for being considered effeminate_ as "misandry" and I just.

It's not that you aren't experiencing something real. You very well may be. But it isn't "misandry." Because "misandry" doesn't exist.
Yes, this applies to trans men as well. "Transmisandry" _also_ isn't a thing and just contributes to anti-feminist narratives. It treats itself as a mirror of transmisogyny, but transmisogyny is _intersective_: we experience transphobia _and_ we experience misogyny _and_ we experience this unholy thing that happens when the two interact. It's not a subset, even an exclusive subset, it's an intersection.
But the following all are absolutely problems that can be talked about!
* Transphobia/Transmisia
* Antitransmasculity
* Transemasculation
* Misogyny
It sucks to be discriminated against, but the language that we use is so, so important here.

The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Simplified. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Simplified translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):
hypo_0:
我亲爱的“那个不能提名字的人”阵营里的兄弟啊，你描述的那种情况是_厌女_的后果，不是什么“厌男”。

我真的太希望男人们能明白：不是说某个问题是冲着你们来的，而且还是个真实严重的问题，它就一定是“厌男”。
刚看到有人把因为_被认为太娘_而受到歧视说成是“厌男”，我真是……

不是说你没有在经历真实的东西。你很可能确实在经历。但那不是“厌男”。因为“厌男”根本不存在。
对，这也适用于跨性别男性。“跨男厌恶”_也_不是个东西，而且只会助长反女权叙事。它总把自己当成跨性别厌女的镜像，但跨性别厌女是_交叉性的_：我们会经历跨性别恐惧，_也_会经历厌女，_还_会经历那种两者相互作用时产生的可怕东西。它不是某个子集，哪怕是排他的子集也不是，它是一个交叉点。
但下面这些当然全都是真实存在、也完全可以讨论的问题！
* 跨性别恐惧/跨性别厌恶
* 反跨性别男性气质
* 跨性别去男性化
* 厌女
被歧视真的很糟，但我们在这里使用的语言真的、真的非常重要。
hypo_1:
我亲爱的“那个名字不能提的人”阵营里的兄弟，你描述的那种情况，是_厌女_的结果，不是什么“厌男”。

我真的特别希望男人们能明白：一个问题就算是针对你们的，而且也确实是个严重的现实问题，也不代表它就是“厌男”。
刚看到有人把因为_被认为不够有男子气概、太女性化_而遭受歧视，说成是“厌男”，我真的……

不是说你没有在经历真实存在的伤害。你很可能确实有。但那不是“厌男”。因为“厌男”并不存在。
对，跨性别男性也一样。“跨男厌恶”_也_不是个成立的概念，而且只会给反女权叙事添砖加瓦。它总把自己当成“跨性别厌女”的镜像，但“跨性别厌女”是_交叉性的_：我们会经历跨性别恐惧，_也_会经历厌女，_还_会经历那种两者相互作用时产生的、很邪门的东西。它不是某个子集，哪怕是排他的子集也不是，它是一个交叉点。
不过，下面这些当然全都是真实存在、完全可以拿出来讨论的问题！
* 跨性别恐惧/跨性别厌恶
* 对跨男性气质的敌视
* 对跨性别者的去男性化
* 厌女

Excuse me, but these have a pearlized finish.
The other ones are patent leather.
What's wrong with patent leather?
They were like screaming 1995.
It was totally embarrassing.
That's it.
Shoes do not scream.
What year it is.
The shopping addiction of yours has got to stop.
But, daddy.
From now on, no more pit stops on rodeo.

source_doc:
Good Morning Worlds!
We are going to the tip this morning. It will clear some of the stuff we sorted yesterday from the drive. I don't think we can clear it all unless we took the trailer, but the trailer is full of steel for weighing in.
Later I might carry on packing tote crates.
#GoodMorningWorlds

Tip trip done, and another car load cleared out.
I have taken the new trailer axle, and trailer drive motor system, out of the scrap metal trailer load. That means we can get more scrap metal in there and also not accidentally weigh in the parts I want to keep.
I think, next, I will start moving the scrap steel from the back garden into the trailer so that it is ready to go.
Scrap steel prices are not very high at the moment but better than nothing, if I take enough of it in one go.
Still have to sort the non-ferrous scrap.

That thing when you are taking the rotten tyres off small, wide lawn tractor wheels....
Huge effort to unmount one side of the tyre, but it was really badly rusted tight on the other side of the rim.
In the time it took me to break the bead free, I'd forgotten I had already done the other side, and ended up with the rim free but completely inside the tyre!
I had to remount the tyre that side, and then work around it to get the rim out.
I had to cut up the inner tube to get that out too!
I wonder how many more tyres I need to unmount? Four done so far.

Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Simplified. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Simplified translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):
hypo_0:
早安，世界们！
我们今天早上要去垃圾回收站。这样就能把昨天从车道上整理出来的一些东西清掉。我觉得除非把拖车也带上，不然应该清不完，不过拖车里已经装满了等着去称重的废钢。
晚点我可能会继续打包收纳箱。
#早安世界们

垃圾站这一趟搞定了，又清出去了一车东西。
我已经把新的拖车车轴和拖车驱动电机系统，从那车废金属里拿出来了。这样一来，里面就能再多装点废金属，也不会不小心把我想留着的零件一起拿去称重卖掉。
我想接下来我要开始把后院的废钢搬到拖车里，这样就随时可以拉走了。
现在废钢价格不算高，不过一次多拉一点去卖的话，总比没有强。
还得把有色金属废料分拣出来。

就是那种你在把小型宽胎草坪拖拉机轮子上的烂轮胎拆下来的时候会遇到的事……
费了老大劲才把轮胎一边拆下来，结果另一边跟轮圈锈死得特别厉害。
等我把胎唇从轮圈上撬松的时候，已经忘了另一边其实早就拆开了，最后变成轮圈是松了，可却整个卡进轮胎里面去了！
我只好先把那一边的轮胎重新装回去，然后再慢慢折腾着把轮圈弄出来。
连内胎我都得剪开才能弄出来！
不知道我还得拆多少条轮胎？目前拆完四条了。

hypo_4:
早安呀，世界们！
我们今天早上要去垃圾回收站，这样就能把昨天从车道上整理出来的一些东西清掉。我觉得除非把拖车也带上，不然应该没法一次清完，不过拖车里已经装满了准备拿去过磅的废钢。
晚点我可能会继续装周转箱。
#早安世界们

垃圾回收站这一趟搞定了，又清出去一车东西。
我已经把新的拖车车轴和拖车驱动电机系统，从那车废金属里拿出来了。这样一来，里面就能再装更多废金属，也不会不小心把我想留着的零件一起拿去过磅。
我想接下来要开始把后院的废钢搬到拖车里，这样就随时可以拉走了。
现在废钢价格不算高，不过如果一次多拉一点去卖，总比没有强。
有色金属废料还是得再分一分。

就是那种你在拆小型宽胎草坪拖拉机车轮上的烂轮胎时会遇到的破事……
费了老大劲才把轮胎一边拆下来，结果另一边却和轮圈锈死卡住了。
等我终于把胎边从轮圈上弄开的时候，我都忘了另一边其实早就已经拆开了，结果就变成轮圈虽然松出来了，却整个跑进了轮胎里面！
我只好先把那一边重新装回去，再一点点把轮圈弄出来。
连内胎我都得剪开才能弄出来！
真不知道我还得再拆多少条轮胎？目前已经拆了四条。

source_doc:
I just had a very nice #dream that I made friends with Lee Chaeyeon. I just started talking to her nand the next thing I know, I have stayed over her house (like when the French kidnapped me for Christmas) and she is telling me to go up stairs and "shuffle up a little bit" (her English was generally excellent) by which she meant "tidy up a little bit" to show her mom we were ready to eat.
She comes upstairs to "shuffle up" her room and starts making gestures to explain what she means ...
1/

(she was always so excited to see me in this dream) because I was taking my coat off instead of "shuffling up."
Then she indicates this little piece of paper and says she has left me an autograph but in return she wants this little trading card I made in second grade of "50 Spikes," a sonic knock-off, obviously with more spikes. (This card actually exists IRL BTW). I start explaining to her what it is and if she really wants it (she did) I at least needed a picture of her holding it.
2/

Partly because I would miss it, but also, otherwise no one would believe me that she had wanted this thing from me.
It was then I realized we still didn't have each others' phone numbers.
3/3

Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):
hypo_0:
我刚做了一个超美好的#梦，梦见我和李彩演成了朋友。我刚开始跟她聊天，然后一眨眼我就住到她家去了（就像法国人圣诞节把我“绑走”那次一样），她还叫我上楼去“稍微整理一下”（她英语整体都说得超好），她的意思其实是“稍微收拾一下”，好让她妈妈看出来我们已经准备好吃饭了。
她上楼来“稍微整理”她的房间，还开始比手画脚地解释她的意思……
1/

（她在这个梦里每次见到我都超级兴奋）因为我在脱外套，而不是“稍微整理一下”。
然后她指着一小张纸，说她给我留了个签名，但作为交换，她想要我二年级时做的一张“50 Spikes”小卡片，就是个明显照着索尼克仿的版本，只不过刺更多。（顺带一提，这张卡现实里真的存在）。我就开始跟她解释那到底是什么，如果她真的想要（她确实想要），那我至少得拍一张她拿着它的照片。
2/

一部分是因为我会舍不得它，但也是因为不然根本不会有人相信她居然想从我这儿要这个东西。
也就是那时候我才意识到，我们居然还没有彼此的电话号码。
3/3

我刚做了个特别美好的#梦，梦见我和李彩演成了朋友。我才刚开始跟她说话，结果下一秒就发现自己已经住到她家去了（就像那次我被法国人“绑去”过圣诞节一样），然后她叫我上楼去“稍微shuffle一下”（她英语其实整体都说得特别好），她的意思其实是“稍微收拾一下”，好让她妈妈知道我们已经准备好吃饭了。
她也上楼去“shuffle”她的房间，还开始一边比划一边解释她到底想表达什么……
1/

（她在这个梦里每次见到我都超级兴奋）因为我当时在脱外套，而不是在“shuffle”。
然后她指着这一小张纸，说她给我留了个签名，但作为交换，她想要我二年级时做的一张“50 Spikes”卡片——一个一看就是索尼克山寨版的角色，只不过刺更多。（顺便说一句，这张卡现实里真的存在哈哈。）我就开始跟她解释那到底是什么；如果她真的想要（她确实想要），那我至少得拍一张她拿着它的照片。
2/

一方面是因为我会舍不得，另一方面也是因为，不然根本不会有人相信她居然会想从我这里要这个东西。
也就是那时候我才意识到，我们居然连彼此的电话号码都还没有。
3/3

source_doc:
As head of this house, I shall arrange for an immediate investigation.
I'd rather not, if you don't mind, sir.
Doctor Sexton, the fact that my brother and sister and I have opened our home to convalescent patients doesn't relieve us of all responsibility for what occurs in it.
I mean, under the peculiar circumstances.
Oh, come along, Bob.
There's no need to shield anyone.

source_doc:
$partner has a video consult with Ikea to quote for a fitted kitchen. It's a fascinating glimpse into the ecosystem of online services for boomers.
1. They send link for video consult, three weeks ago. It uses Ikea's proprietary videoconf solution
2. They request the designs & 3D renders for the new kitchen
3. they send an email saying "thanks for sending through the design
4. We dial in today, they start the call with "our system blocked your files, let's design your kitchen together"
1/x

5. Partner asks if there's any way to share the (very detailed, took us like a full man week to put together) designs, but the Ikea salesdrone is on a script, and isn't having a bar of it.
6. The next step in the script is "laboriously do the design from scratch over the phone with the client, hunting and pecking on the keyboard and not fast using the UI of their design software"
2/x

7. They cannot share their screen, so it's a clown show of repeated misunderstanding about which part of which image is being referred to

8. the clock has just ticked past what should have been the full consult, and they're 35% the way thru getting the required measurements.

9. So far there's been literally 8 minutes of salesdrone laboriously inputting the measurements supplied
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Simplified translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Simplified grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Simplified. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Simplified translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):
hypo_0:
$partner 和宜家约了个视频咨询，好给定制厨房报价。这简直是让我大开眼界，见识了一把老年人在线服务生态。
1. 他们三周前发来视频咨询链接，用的是宜家自家的视频会议系统
2. 他们要求提供新厨房的设计图和 3D 效果图
3. 他们发邮件说：“谢谢你发来的设计图
4. 我们今天接入后，他们一开场就说：“我们的系统把你的文件拦截了，我们还是一起重新设计你的厨房吧”
1/x

5. 伴侣问有没有办法共享那些设计图（细到爆，我们差不多花了整整一人周才搞出来），但那个宜家销售工具人完全照本宣科，根本不接这茬。
6. 剧本的下一步就是：“跟客户打着电话，一点一点从零开始重新做设计，在他们那个设计软件的界面里慢吞吞地敲键盘找东西，效率低得离谱”
2/x

7. 他们还不能共享屏幕，于是整场就成了大型翻车现场，不停地误会到底是在说哪张图里的哪个部分

8. 时间已经滴答滴答超过了本来应该完整结束咨询的点，而他们连所需尺寸都才量到 35%。

9. 到目前为止，那个销售工具人光是慢吞吞输入我们提供的尺寸，就已经实打实花了 8 分钟

source_doc:
painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [1/x]
I figured it'd be fun to share the whole process that goes into making a painting a custom scene. could be useful to some, and entertaining to others :)
👩‍🦱 ~ EVE & ADAM ~ 🧔‍♂️
as you all know, I'm a deeply religious person 🛐 so..
the scene: we're in the garden of eden. adam is eating apples from the forbidden tree, because of course he is. eve is having none of his shit, grabs an unfortunate unsuspecting nearby serpent, and is about to whip the shit out of adam. 🐍
#painting

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [2/x]
so, we're gonna need reference photos. I want eve to be in the process of swinging the serpent around; so then I figured a baseball batter would be a good fit.
so wading through the AI slop, I found this actual photo that has a nice pose and good lighting.

painting with bazkie! 🧵 a (slow) thread [3/x]
I want adam to be in a protective stance, while also holding a forbidden apple, and all this, seen from the side/back. also, the lighting has to come from the same side as the batter. so all and all, it's pretty hard to find a proper reference pic for this, so I am posing for this one myself.
took about 20 pics with slightly different in stances etc., and decided on this one. (the right hand is going to hold the apple)

So this little room right here needs to be cleaned out.
I need to throw away a bunch of stuff.
There's a bunch of stuff left in there from the previous owners of this house, and I've never really gone through it.
So what better time than right now with the world watching?
Kind of a mess in here?
Turn on the light.
You can see there's a couple of shelves there with some things on them.
Yeah, I've been meaning to clean this up for quite some time and it is time.
So here is some kind of a case.
I'll bet you anything I know exactly what this is.

I am waiting, professor.
Well, what do you see in my hand?
I see the hand of a of a charming young man.
Within the next few months Lord Arthur will go on a voyage.
Naturally, his honeymoon.
And lose a relative.
Well, we all lose relatives.
Sometimes I think they were created for the purpose.
Can you tell us any more?
No, Lady Clementine.
That's all I can say.

@hannorein@mastodon.social sooo, we’re tagging verified human content now for them to have a dataset with less slop to train on?
I don’t know, they should asphyxiate from their own barfed up slop mess they’ve created until their latent vector space converges to unity.

@helpsterTee @hannorein My first thought as well. I killed off my personal site since I didn't want to feed the various Torment Nexuses. Marking genuine human content just makes building new, unpoisoned and slop free data sets easier.
I thought about doing the opposite and building a "poison pot" for AI crawlers but my poor little server is not that beefy.

@CodingPhysicist@mstdn.social @hannorein@mastodon.social yeah, if we suffer, let them suffer.
If your employer stuffs AI in your daily routine, instead of resigning, use malicious compliance and apply it to totally mundane problems and embrace slightly-wrong answers while burning through corporate token credit to ruin quarterly performance.
I’m so fed up with this and they’re using it anyways against us, so let’s have a little fun, while we can 🫤
Edit: they’re making up numbers all the time and faking profits for a while now, the usage that’ll bankrupt your employer won’t place a dent at slop headquarters unprofitable scam business anyways or their forest burning slopetuum mobile.

source_doc:
project move out, spring break relay
day 1:
Cleared main bedroom closet
& contents of boxes on one wall.
I'm surveying all my belongings. Pulling out a small percentage to save. Sentimental items. Practical pieces for putting together a new life. At this stage I know I'm selecting more than I need, probably more than I can carry; but the amount that I'm leaving behind is far greater. Deciding what to keep & where comes after the survey. All the rest will be turned over to "scavengers."
#moverR

Day 2, midday break, Monday.
Today is harder than yesterday. I'm uncovering far more "sentimental" stuff. The challenge: these saved memories are a physical drag that impair rather than contribute anything practically to my future AND I feel integrated looking at them. There's a strong general condemnation, I feel, of holding onto sentimental items. Yet I know that they are powerful. But hey, I'm an artist. Even wistful, sad memories are valuable to me. I'm proceeding as before, retaining less+

+than I'm tossing, while knowing that I am keeping "too much." The next phase will be the actual moving & storing phase when more might be cut. This phase is the pre-screen before turning the cleared items over to others who will take everything away.
File under: how to move out of a home of 12 years & a home town of 45 years, with family roots here (& artifacts) from 150 years. I'm finally leaving, in search of a culture that suits my values.
#moverR

Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):
hypo_0:
搬家行动，春假接力
第1天：
清空了主卧衣橱
& 还有一面墙边几箱东西里的内容。
我在盘点我所有的东西。挑出很小一部分留下。那些有纪念意义的东西。还有一些为了拼出新生活而实用的物件。到这个阶段，我知道我选的比我需要的更多，可能也比我能带走的更多；但我留下不带走的东西要多得多。决定留什么&放哪儿，要等盘点完再说。剩下的其他东西都会交给“捡漏的人”。
#搬家记录

第2天，中午休息，周一。
今天比昨天更难。我翻出了更多“有纪念意义”的东西。难点在这：这些被保存下来的回忆在现实里是种负担，对我的未来在实际层面上不是加分，反而是拖累；可我看着它们时，又会觉得自己是完整连贯的。我感觉，大家普遍都很谴责紧抓着有纪念意义的物品不放。可我知道，它们的力量很大。不过嘛，我是个艺术家。就算是惆怅的、悲伤的回忆，对我来说也有价值。我还是像之前那样继续，留得更少+

+扔得更多，同时也知道自己还是留了“太多”。下一阶段就是真正搬运&收纳的阶段，到时候可能还会再砍掉一些。这一阶段算是正式交给那些会把清出来的东西统统带走的人之前的预筛选。
归档：如何搬离一个住了12年的家&一个住了45年的家乡，这里还有我家150年的根（& 各种旧物）。我终于要离开了，去寻找一种更符合我价值观的文化。
#搬家记录

+同时也清楚，自己其实还是留了“太多”。下一阶段就是真正搬运&收纳存放的时候了，到时候可能还会再砍掉一些。这一阶段，是在把清出来的东西交给那些会把一切都带走的人之前，先做一轮预筛。
归档：如何搬离一个住了12年的家&一个生活了45年的家乡，而我的家族在这里已经扎根150年（& 也留下了许多旧物）。我终于要离开了，去寻找一种更符合我价值观的文化环境。
#搬家记录

source_doc:
i am hesitant to declare it but i may be right around the point of behavior calculation optimization where there's nothing more that can be done without actually decimating the number of paths being processed.
And that might actually be the play because things like UCT are smarter about traversing a tree with a budget and splitting how deep vs broad you go

at the end of the day, it's always going to be possible that some enemy picks up some combination of abilities/items where the combinatorial explosion of possibility space is unable to calculate fast on any hardware, so I was always going to need to cap it somewhere, just that theoretical cap is now 40x bigger than it was in january

Welp think I'm going to implement UCT because my game's just Go now this is going to be a journey

source_doc:
right, so, as i was saying, i dmed this very well known and very friendly seeming artist-type person and gave em the usual spiel:
- how bridge works
- how to bridge
- please do so because i want to follow you and reblog some of your stuff that i like
- if you don't want to, that's fine
and they responded "not doing that" which is all well and good but then they blocked me???
just like, for absolutely no fucking reason

not naming any names because i do NOT dislike anybody involved and i certainly do not want to incite any brigading, but this has happened with several people now, including people who have REBLOGGED AND LIKED BRIDGED POSTS FROM THIS ACCOUNT (my main), which is WHY I WANTED TO FOLLOW THEM

if they had just said "no thanks" they would have gotten an "ok, perfectly understandable! :)" or the like from me, but now everyone has to put up with my confused ranting instead. i'm not even angry, i'm just *genuinely baffled*

bsky people, is this a genuine issue over on your platform (because it's one i've almost *never* had over here on this side of the bridge) or am i just running into bad apple after bad apple

I honestly don't know what people's general feelings are about enabling the Bridgy Fed here, because that's just not a topic that ever comes up tbh (unfortunately)… But there's definitely some subset of people here who are super trigger-happy about the block button, I'm not a fan of this either.

hypo_0:
对，就是，我刚刚说到哪了，我私信了一个很有名、看起来也很友好的那种艺术家类型的人，给对方发了平时那套说明：
- bridge 是怎么运作的
- 要怎么 bridge
- 请这么做一下，因为我想关注你，也想转发一些我喜欢的你的内容
- 如果你不想，也完全没关系
结果对方回了句“我不弄这个”，这本来也没啥，但然后他们居然把我拉黑了？？？
真的就是，完全他妈没理由

我不点名，因为我并不讨厌这里面任何人，我当然也不想煽动任何人去围攻谁，但这种事现在已经发生在好几个人身上了，其中甚至包括转发过、点赞过这个账号（我的主号）桥接帖子的人，这也就是为什么我当时想关注他们

如果他们只是说一句“不了，谢谢”，那我这边收到的就只会是“好的，完全可以理解！:)”之类的回复，但现在大家反而得忍受我这通困惑的碎碎念。我甚至都不生气，我只是*真的特别困惑*

bsky 的各位，这在你们那边的平台上真的是个普遍问题吗（因为在桥这边这几乎是我*从来*没怎么遇到过的事），还是说只是我倒霉，接二连三碰上烂苹果

老实说，我真不知道大家对在这边启用 Bridgy Fed 整体上是什么态度，因为说真的，这话题平时根本不会被提起（可惜）……不过这边确实有一部分人对拉黑键特别手快，我也不喜欢这样。

{
  "landing_page.why_join_company.free.description": "We don't get in the way of you interacting with people and having fun. People can support us for nice to have features.",
  "landing_page.testimonials.description": "Thousands of members have found friendships, a community, love, and much more with us. Here are just a few of their stories:",

  "advertise.why_advertise.content.item_4": "You can change up your ads throughout the month to keep things fresh.",
  "advertise.how_it_works.content.description": "Rather than selling impressions or clicks, we’ve divided our ad space into equally sized slots:",

  "advertise.cost.content.description": "A slot starts at $500 USD per month. If you would like to run more than one slot a month, each additional slot starts at $400 USD per month.",

  "advertise.contact_us.content.description": "If you have any questions or would like to advertise on our website please email us at:",

  "advertise.sample_ads.cta_label": "view all",
  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.heading": "Welcome Home",

  "welcome.interstitial.slides.intro.pace.heading": "Go at Your Own Pace",

  "welcome.interstitial.slides.love.description": "Love what you find appealing and interesting. The more you love, the better we can recommend stuff you'll enjoy.",

}

source_doc:
@Edent ah, interesting - was the Hub 5 something you had to request from Virgin, or did you just get one elsewhere and set it up? (As per recent discussion was issued with a 5x, with its lack Modem Mode.)

@yvan I already had the Hub 4. I went onto their online chat and whinged about poor download speeds until they sent me a new Hub.
If you're on the XPON network, I don't think you have a choice though.

@Edent ah yeah, just been trying to do some research, but it's all a bit muddy... I'm FTTP/XGS-PON so I think just stuck with the 5x... not an insurmountable problem, just a little annoying. (But compared to unreliable <40mpbs BT rotting fenland copper that cost me more than Virgin... I'm not really complaining.)
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Simplified translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Simplified grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Simplified. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Simplified translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):
hypo_0:
@Edent 啊，挺有意思的——Hub 5 是你得跟 Virgin 申请才给的，还是你自己从别的地方弄了一个来设置的？（按最近的讨论来看，他们发的是 5x，没有调制解调器模式。）

@yvan 我本来就有 Hub 4。我去他们的在线客服那边吐槽下载速度太差，直到他们给我寄了个新的 Hub。
不过如果你用的是 XPON 网络，我觉得你应该没得选。

source_doc:
Reading Gloria Steinem's undercover report on being a Playboy Bunny... finished Part I and damn🤔
Despite being well aware of Playboy being uh... a CORPORATION lol... had no idea how much their entire infrastructure truly served to perpetuate classism in an extremely creepy way while outwardly presenting themselves as the "classy" and thus "more ethical" option compared to say, Hustler

I'll post some screenshots later but to give you the gist, Bunnies (who were cocktail waitresses), had to:
- accept lower (by $200-150, equivalent to today's $2.5K) wages than advertised
- hand over 50% of all their tips
- give their last names to "Number 1 key holders" (ergo, celebrities/elites) if asked
- be subjected to a pelvic exam and blood test but weren't allowed to pick the physician
- be spied on by a private eye
- go out if their way to hide their husbands/bfs

The central point that unites all of this:
Bunnies were STRICTLY NOT ALLOWED TO (penalized by termination) date any other employees or customers... BUT accompanying and dating the "Number 1 key holders" was permitted, if not encouraged. See where this is going?

New recruits were given a "Bunny Bible" to study all those bizarre rules and instructions from.
To mention a few more:
- Bunnies' work performance was assessed by a "merit system" (YES, that exact wording!) instead of being written up. Unsurprisingly, merit was not only judged by a good work ethic but also very specific requirements on looks and attitude.
- there was an incentive system in place that rewarded Bunnies who sold the most liquor and merchandise

hypo_0:
在读Gloria Steinem卧底做花花公子兔女郎的报道……刚看完第一部分，我靠🤔
虽然我早就知道Playboy 呃……是个大公司 lol……但我完全不知道，他们整套体系居然这么赤裸又诡异地在维系阶级歧视，表面上还把自己包装成“高雅”的、因此比比如 Hustler “更有道德”的选择

我晚点会发一些截图，不过先简单说下重点，兔女郎（其实就是鸡尾酒女服务员）必须：
- 接受比招聘广告里写的更低的工资（少了150到200美元，按现在算差不多是2500美元）
- 上交自己全部小费的50%

source_doc:
Oh, oh, they stopped playing.
What do you mean?
The music has stopped?
What are you saying?
I hear it.
Oh, and it's so beautiful.
How can you hear the music?
You see, they're putting away their instruments.
Oh.
You heard them playing.
Well.
Darling, do you hear things?
Sybil, this is our music played at our engagement party.
I think I'll hear it for the rest of my life.

hypo_0: 那边火车太多了，他们连不让火车互相撞上的事都忙不过来。各个方向都有火车在跑。每趟车上都有人。有人要去，有人刚走。我觉得要是大家都待在一个地方，这个世界会更好。现在，我在铁路上干了27年，学到的就是这个。
hypo_1: 那边火车多得很，光是防着它们别撞到一块儿就够他们忙的了。火车朝四面八方跑，每趟车上都坐着人。有人正要走，也有人刚离开。我觉得，要是人人都待在一个地方，这世界会更好。现在，我在铁路上干了二十七年，学到的就是这个。
hypo_2: 那边火车多得很，他们光是防着这些火车别互相撞上，就已经够费劲了。火车朝四面八方开，趟趟都坐满了人。有人正要走，也有人刚离开。我觉得，要是人人都老老实实待在一个地方，这世界会更好。现在，我在铁路上干了二十七年，学到的就是这么个理儿。
hypo_3: 那边火车多得很，光是让它们别彼此撞上就够他们忙的了。火车朝四面八方跑，每一趟上头都有人。有人正要走，也有人刚离开。我觉得，要是人人都待在一个地方不动，这世界会更美好。好了，我在铁路上干了二十七年，学到的道理就是这个。
hypo_4: 那边火车多得很，他们光是防着这些火车互相撞上就够费劲的了。火车往四面八方开，每一列上都有人。有人正要走，也有人刚离开。我觉得，要是人人都待在一个地方不动，这世界会更美好。好了，我在铁路上干了二十七年，学到的道理就是这个。
hypo_5: 那边火车多得很，光是让它们别互相撞上，就够他们忙活的了。火车朝四面八方开着，每一列上都坐着人。有人正要走，也有人刚离开。我觉得，要是人人都老老实实待在一个地方，这世界会更好。好了，我在铁路上干了二十七年，学到的道理就是这个。
hypo_6: 那边火车多得很，光是让它们别撞到一块儿，就够他们头疼的了。火车四面八方地跑着，每一列上都有人。有人正要走，也有人刚离开。我看哪，要是人人都待在一个地方不动，这世界倒会更太平。好了，我在铁路上干了二十七年，学到的道理就是这个。
hypo_7: 那边火车多得很，他们光是想办法不让这些火车互相撞上，就已经够费劲了。火车朝四面八方开，每一趟上都坐着人。有人正要走，也有人刚走。我觉得要是人人都老老实实待在一个地方，这世界会更好。好了，我在铁路上干了二十七年，悟出来的就是这么个理儿。

@la Isn't rule #1 of machining that if you haven't faced it off, it's not square or flat?

@azonenberg yes, of course, but I *did* mean to face it off. I just had my tool zero set wrong.
Because I assumed that it was roughtly flat.
I'm making an extra part today. I have the stock. And if I don't it will bug me to no end. Plus, during test fitting the bearing I broke the glue holding the part on my plate, so I would have to indicate it back in anyways, which I don't wanna dooooo, so.....

@la I know the feeling.
Had a similar problem when working on my house where literally every datum you might think of using was wrong.
I had a contractor frame a door frame plumb and square. Had to rip out a couple of studs after he left because the door needed to be like a degree off level in order to be flush with the floor and not floating in the air on one side.
Another (partial height) wall has each stud carefully cut to length because no two are the same size... The floor isn't flat so to make the countertop level you need the wall to be a parallelogram rather than a rectangle

@la 机械加工的第一条规则难道不是：如果你还没端面，那它就既不方也不平吗？

@azonenberg 对啊，当然，但我*本来*就是打算端面的。只是我刀具零点设错了。
因为我以为它大概是平的。
我今天要重做一个零件。料还有。而且如果不做，这事会一直让我浑身难受。再说了，试装轴承的时候我把固定零件到板子上的胶给弄开了，所以反正还得重新校正装回去，而我一点都不想这么干啊啊啊，所以.....

@la 我太懂这种感觉了。
我整房子的时候也碰到过类似的问题，真的是你能想到拿来当基准的每个面居然都是歪的。
我找了个师傅把门框装得又垂直又方正。结果他走了以后我还得拆掉几根立柱，因为门得故意偏离水平差不多一度，才能和地板齐平，不然一边就悬在空中。
还有另一面（半高）墙，每根立柱都得仔细按长度单独裁，因为没有两根是一样长的…… 地面不平，所以想让台面水平的话，那面墙就得是个平行四边形而不是长方形

source_doc:
And being one of the weirdo, we just frequently get attacks here and there. Either online, offline, or even from your closest people. Those attacks usually stem from homophobia, transphobia, or sometimes just, don't like how weird we are and how weird we act, especially furries that do deeper immersions like roleplaying and therianthropy.

Hence some of us got safety by not needing to tell who we are and where we were from. Some of us got safety by only revealing ourselves to our friends or close friends. Face/body reveal is a culture that most of the furries did at least once in a private post, whether it be "delete soon" kind of post or in story.

Despite being so, we're still open for social interactions offline. We do furmeets—a personal meeting between furries, be it in a group or personal, be it in an event or just casually—and sometimes making a con/fur on, such as MWFF, IWAG, PAWAI, FURUM, and so on. It's fun to meet them offline, get to know each other, be able to see them in person as most of us have never seen each other's faces, take a photo to keep personally and censor publicly, laugh together and discuss similar interests, and so on. It's fun, social, and warm.

Although, things don't feel the same today. As people start trying to strip anonymity of people, attack furries, therian, LGBTQIA, and dox them, as how also our community participate and stir the dramas inside, things has been a little more chaotic, less warm, and less feeling like community or family. It's not the same anymore.

Part of me hopes things can return to how it feels in the 2000s and 2010s, but, I'll just let God do the rest. I'm a little hopeless in society and humans. I'm tired of how things get worse and meant to attack and divide small communities into a hopeless being. I don't like how society is now no longer respecting and being in unity.

Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):
hypo_0:
而且作为“怪人”中的一员，我们就是会时不时在这儿那儿遭到攻击。不管是线上、线下，甚至来自你最亲近的人。这些攻击通常源于恐同、恐跨，或者有时候就只是因为他们不喜欢我们有多奇怪、我们的行为有多怪，尤其是那些投入更深的兽迷，比如角色扮演和兽化认同（therianthropy）这类。

所以我们有些人选择不说出自己是谁、来自哪里，来保护自己的安全。也有些人只会对朋友或很亲近的朋友透露自己。露脸/露身算是一种很多兽迷至少都会做过一次的文化，一般会发在私密帖子里，要么是那种“马上删”的贴，要么就是发在动态里。

即便如此，我们在线下社交这方面还是很开放的。我们会办 furmeet——也就是兽迷之间的线下见面，不管是群体还是个人，不管是在活动里还是只是随便约着见——有时候也会办展会/兽展，比如 MWFF、IWAG、PAWAI、FURUM 之类的。线下见到他们真的很开心，彼此认识一下，终于能见到真人，毕竟我们大多数人以前都没见过彼此的脸；一起拍照，私下留着、公开时打码；一起笑，一起聊相同的兴趣，等等。那种感觉很开心，很有社交感，也很温暖。

不过，到了今天，一切已经不太一样了。越来越多人开始试图扒掉别人的匿名身份，攻击兽迷、therian、LGBTQIA 群体，还开盒他们，再加上我们社群内部也有人在参与、煽动各种 drama，事情变得更混乱了，也没那么温暖了，也越来越不像一个社群、一个家了。已经不是以前那个样子了。

我有一部分还是希望，一切能回到 2000 年代和 2010 年代那种感觉，但剩下的，我就交给上帝吧。我对社会和人类已经有点绝望了。我真的累了，累于眼看着事情越来越糟，累于看到那些本来就很小的社群被人刻意攻击、分裂，最后变得毫无希望。我不喜欢现在这个社会，已经不再懂得尊重，也不再团结了。

所以，我们有些人会通过不透露自己是谁、来自哪里来保护自己。也有些人只会向朋友或很亲近的朋友公开自己。露脸/露身在兽迷圈里算是一种挺常见的文化，很多人至少都会在私密贴里发过一次，不管是那种“过会儿删”的帖子，还是限时动态。

即使这样，我们对线下社交其实还是很开放的。我们会参加 furmeet——也就是兽迷之间的线下见面，不管是群体还是一对一，不管是在活动上还是只是随便约出来——有时候也会办 con/fur con，比如 MWFF、IWAG、PAWAI、FURUM 之类的。能在线下见到他们真的很开心，彼此认识一下，终于能见到真人，毕竟我们大多数人以前都没见过彼此长什么样；一起拍照，自己留着，公开发的时候打码；一起笑，一起聊共同的兴趣，等等。那种感觉很快乐、很有社交感，也很温暖。

但是，现在一切已经不太一样了。越来越多人开始想要剥掉别人的匿名身份，去攻击兽迷、兽化认同者、LGBTQIA 群体，甚至开盒他们；再加上我们社群内部也有人参与其中、搅动各种风波，整个环境变得更混乱了，没那么温暖了，也越来越没有“社群”或者“家人”那种感觉了。已经不是从前那样了。

所以，我们有些人会靠不说出自己是谁、来自哪里来保护自己。也有些人只会向朋友，或者很亲近的朋友，透露真实的自己。露脸/露身在兽迷圈其实算是一种常见文化，大多数兽迷至少都在私密帖子里发过一次，不管是那种“马上删”的贴，还是发在限时动态里。

即使这样，我们对线下社交依然是开放的。我们会参加 furmeet——也就是兽迷之间的线下见面，不管是群体聚会还是私下约见，不管是在活动里还是单纯随便聚聚——有时候也会办 con/fur con，比如 MWFF、IWAG、PAWAI、FURUM 等等。能在线下见到大家真的很开心，可以认识彼此，终于看到对方本人，毕竟我们大多数人以前都没见过彼此的脸；可以一起拍照，自己私下留着，公开发的时候再打码；可以一起笑，一起聊共同的兴趣，等等。那种感觉很快乐，很有社交感，也很温暖。

不过，到了今天，很多事情已经不是以前那个感觉了。越来越多人开始试图扒掉别人的匿名身份，去攻击兽迷、兽性认同者、LGBTQIA 群体，甚至开盒他们；再加上我们社群内部也有人掺和进去，把各种风波越搅越大，整个环境也变得更混乱了，没那么温暖了，也越来越没有那种像社群、像家人一样的感觉了。已经回不去了。

我心里还是有一部分希望，一切能回到 2000 年代和 2010 年代那种感觉，但剩下的，我就交给上帝吧。我对社会和人类已经有点失望了。我真的很累，累于看着一切变得越来越糟，累于看着那些小小的社群被攻击、被分裂，最后只剩下无力感。我不喜欢现在这样的社会，不再彼此尊重，也不再团结了。
hypo_7:

source_doc:
I just saw Kendall Coyne Schofield in her jersey during warmups... is she playing today??? 🤩
#PWHL #hizzackySeason BOS at MIN

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Whatever Heise did to put a Fleet player on her butt at center ice, that Fleet player paid back HARD 10 seconds later. Yeesh. 😬🫣
On the one hand, I want the Fleet's goalie's PWHL debut to go well, but on the other hand, I want the Frost to win.
Kendall Coyne Schofield was PISSED at the front of the net with that little stick scramble after the Fleet's second goal. I'm glad to have her fury back on the ice. She is ferocious!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Looks like Klees changed back to his regular first line and Kendall et al needed to get a MFing goal and they got that hot damn MF goal! YES

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
YES! THEY TIED THAT SHIT UP!
Nooooooo, the Fleet is back up.
Roller-coaster of a game, here!

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Wowza, Fleet is *still* gunning for Heise. Yee-ouch. That's two Fleet penalties to that one center-ice unpenalized shove by Heise.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
It is so so good to see Kendall Coyne Schofield parked back at the top of the crease, getting shoved around by women a head taller than her, yet pushing right back, making plays.

#PWHL #hizzackySeason
Crowd is not convinced from what we saw that Curl deserved a double minot for roughing.
Crowd is not happy about this illegal hit call against Fleet on 71's injury.
I don't think we got a single SOG in that last power play.
Boston's defense is just too good. They aren't giving us any openings.

hypo_0:
我刚刚看到Kendall Coyne Schofield热身时穿着她的球衣……她今天要上场吗??? 🤩
#PWHL #疯狂hizzacky赛季 BOS对MIN

#PWHL #疯狂hizzacky赛季
不管Heise在中圈把那个Fleet球员狠狠干翻在冰上的那一下到底做了啥，10秒后那个Fleet球员狠狠还回来了。嘶。😬🫣
一方面，我希望Fleet门将的PWHL首秀能顺顺利利，但另一方面，我又想让Frost赢。
Fleet第二个进球后门前那一小波球杆混战，Kendall Coyne Schofield气炸了。我很高兴又能看到她把这股怒火带回冰面。她真的太凶了！

#PWHL #疯狂hizzacky赛季
看起来Klees又换回了他常规的第一组，Kendall她们几个就是得狠狠干进一个球，然后她们还真他妈进了这个该死的漂亮球！YES

#PWHL #疯狂hizzacky赛季
YES！她们把这破比分扳平了！
不——，Fleet又领先了。
这比赛也太过山车了！

#PWHL #疯狂hizzacky赛季
哇哦，Fleet*还在*死盯着Heise狠狠干。嘶——疼。这都已经是Fleet因为这事吃到的第二个罚了，而Heise在中圈那一下没吹罚的猛推居然啥事没有。

#PWHL #疯狂hizzacky赛季
看到Kendall Coyne Schofield又稳稳站回球门区顶端，明明被比她高一个头的女人们推来搡去，却还是狠狠干回去、继续组织进攻，真的太太太好了。

#PWHL #疯狂hizzacky赛季
就我们刚刚看到的情况，现场观众并不觉得Curl那次粗暴犯规该吃双小罚。
现场观众对Fleet因为71号受伤吃到这次非法冲撞判罚非常不爽。
我觉得我们刚才那次强打里一次射正都没有。
波士顿的防守就是太强了。她们根本不给我们任何空当。

Once upon a time in a kingdom of great beauty.
There was a beast of a property market.
We have seen 40 houses.
The market's just too fast.
Prices are realistic.
If only there was a fearless hero to save the day.
I could kiss you.
Or a fairy godmother.
To make dreams come true.
Oh, angel.
But we live in the real world.
They'll just have to make do with us.
We're back.

Just so you know, Harriet and I didn't actually get back together.
What?
But I saw you kiss her.
Joan.
My acting like I liked you turned real.
And now I'm all confused because I got what I wanted.
But I don't think I want it anymore.
Like that time my parents got Fergie to perform at my ninth birthday and I was like, oh, this is sick.
Then she actually performed and I was like, oh, I forgot what Fergie sounds like.
Does that make sense?
It makes all the sense.

source_doc:
and it's not a bad film — it's a spectacular-looking one in spots — but it is also a film entirely made out of other, better and more thematically cohesive films. so it's 2001 and the three-body problem and arrival and wall-e a little bit, but it's also Quips Sexyman Saves The World Part XVII and ultimately just not that lot

while watching i wondered why the earth needed to be in peril, and if the other two members of the multicultural crew dying to leave the White Man in charge was some kind of an anti-woke statement; but in light of some of the book author andy weir's 'most media literate libertarian' comments about how star trek should be just about spaceships going pew-pew, at least to him the answer is yes to the latter and 'fascism' to the former

@esvrld I read the book a little while back and I may have given him too much credit, especially given his recent decision to open his mouth, but I took the death of the international crew to strand the white boy as an understanding that his second book failed because he is not any good at writing people interacting with each other and his only skill is creating clever little puzzles for his self-insert to solve in complete isolation. Giving him an alien buddy was a good move because it opens the possibility of character interaction without requiring it to resemble the way humans relate to one another

Well, aren't you even going to look at me?
Sure.
You're too young to know anything about children.
I'm sure the agency said you were 25.
You're not 25, are you?
You're nothing like 25.
Have you ever had a job as a governess before?
No.
But have you ever had any kind of a job?
Yes, I have.
But don't you ever finish a sentence.
Yes, if I'm allowed to.
Okay, let's start all over.
Sit down.
Tell me about yourself.

source_doc:
Laverne, you you forget about moving.
I want you to call down.
I want to reserve the auditorium for tomorrow.
Then call every doctor in this building and tell them to be there for a rally.
We are going to fight this.
The great Kirk Corporation.
Well, it's an uphill battle against these corporations.
But I'm with you all the way.
It's like my daddy used to say, never give up a pediatrics office without a fight.
Your daddy said that?
Well, actually, he said about a whiskey still.
But I'm adapting it to the present situation.

source_doc:
I expected to love Project Hail Mary, I LOVED Project Hail Mary, it also destroyed me in a particularly unique way as the wife of a science teacher after a year of watching all science teaching be relentlessly attacked and defunded. People love this movie, which I'm sure will be a success, and they hate my wife's work and destroy her programs and want us to lose our careers. How is it possible for all this to be true at once.

She left at 7am to go teach the hands on labs that she teaches where they handle cells, where they've increased class sizes and reduced TAs, she spends more contact hours with students in lab basements than any other class on the campus. She created a program for community college transfer students to get funded jobs in labs, opening up STEM pathways for those who never would've gotten the chance. For all her above and beyond work she's demonized as "doing DEI in science" which they call illegal

But you know, I guess if she were a white male software engineer writing fanfic about science teaching.... she'd be safe.

@grimalkina the same roots are already in Hail Mary tbh. I like Andy Weir a lot and I don't think he meant it, but the whole "bureaucracy and cooperation are truly the barrier to getting things done, and when shit hits the fan we get a powerful anti-bureaucrat to forego diplomacy and strongarm everyone into doing the project, ethics or what the participants want be damned" struck me as a very American individualism power fantasy, and I would guess an American wrote it if I didn't know

@jcachada @grimalkina
For what it's worth, the book contains this passage that didn't make it to the movie.
---
“I’m curious,” I say to Stratt. “Once we launch Hail Mary. What will you do then?”
“Me?” she said. “Doesn’t matter. Once the Hail Mary launches, my authority ends. I’ll probably be put on trial by a bunch of pissed-off governments for abuse of power. Might spend the rest of my life in jail.”
“I’ll be in the cell next to you,” said Leclerc.
“Are you at all concerned about that?”
She shrugged. “We all have to make sacrifices. If I have to be the world’s whipping boy to secure our salvation, then that’s my sacrifice to make.”
---
Is she better or worse if she thinks she's sacrificing herself?
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Simplified translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Simplified grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is user-generated content from a social media platform. Do not reproduce spelling mistakes. Reproduce marks of expressiveness that communicate meaningful intent (e.g. enthusiasm through capitalisation or elongation) in a way that is natural in Chinese, Simplified. Copy URLs and user handles directly rather than translating them. However, translate hashtags as appropriate for the translation to be natural for social media text. Follow the punctuation of the source text as best as possible. Additional punctuation should be added only if not doing so would seriously alter the comprehension of the text. Translate text in an informal style, like close friends talking, even if it changes the original tone. Produce only the Chinese, Simplified translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):
hypo_0:
我本来就觉得自己会爱上《挽救计划》，结果我是真的太太太爱《挽救计划》了，但作为一个科学老师的妻子，在亲眼看着所有科学教学这一年来不断被攻击、被砍经费之后，这部作品也用一种特别独特的方式把我狠狠干碎了。大家都爱这部电影，我也相信它肯定会成功，可他们却讨厌我妻子的工作，毁掉她的项目，还想让我们失去事业。怎么可能这一切能同时都是真的。

她早上7点就出门去上她那些需要动手操作的实验课，学生会接触细胞那种；班级人数被增加了，助教却被削减了，她在实验楼地下室里和学生面对面待的时间，比校园里任何别的课都多。她还给社区大学转学来的学生创建了一个项目，让他们能拿到有资助的实验室工作，为那些原本根本不可能有机会的人打开了通往STEM的路。可她做了这么多超出本分的事，换来的却是被妖魔化，说她是在“把DEI搞进科学里”，还说这违法

但你也知道，我猜如果她是个写科学教学同人的白人男性软件工程师……她就安全了。

我本来就觉得自己会喜欢《挽救计划》，结果我真的超爱《挽救计划》；但作为一个科学老师的妻子，在过去这一年里眼睁睁看着所有科学教学不断被攻击、被削减经费，这部作品也以一种特别独特的方式把我彻底击垮了。人们喜欢这部电影，我相信它一定会成功；可与此同时，他们又厌恶我妻子的工作，毁掉她的项目，还巴不得我们丢掉饭碗。怎么会这一切居然能同时是真的。

她早上7点就出门，去上她那些需要学生亲手操作的实验课，课上他们要直接接触细胞。班级人数被增加了，助教却被砍了；她在实验楼地下室里和学生面对面待的时间，比校园里任何其他课程都更多。她还为社区大学转学生创办了一个项目，让他们能在实验室拿到有资助的工作，给那些本来根本不可能有机会的人打开了通往STEM的路。可她做了这么多远远超出本职的事，得到的却是被妖魔化，说她是在“把DEI搞进科学里”，还说这违法

但你也知道，我猜如果她是个写科学教学同人文的白人男性软件工程师……她大概就安全了。

@grimalkina 说真的，《挽救计划》里其实已经有同样的根子了。我很喜欢Andy Weir，而且我不觉得他是故意的，但那整套“真正妨碍事情推进的是官僚体系和合作本身；等到事情彻底炸了，就搬出一个强势的反官僚人物，跳过外交，强行逼所有人把项目做下去，至于伦理也好、参与者自己想不想也好，统统见鬼去吧”的逻辑，在我看来特别像一种很美国式的个人主义权力幻想。要不是我本来就知道作者是谁，我大概一看就会猜这是美国人写的

@jcachada @grimalkina
不过话说回来，书里其实有这么一段，电影没拍进去。
---
“我有点好奇，”我对斯特拉特说，“等‘挽救计划’发射之后，你会做什么？”
“我？”她说，“无所谓。一旦‘挽救计划’发射，我的权力也就结束了。我大概会因为滥用权力，被一群气炸了的政府送上审判席。说不定余生都得在监狱里过。”
“我会在你隔壁那间牢房里。”勒克莱尔说。
“你一点都不担心这个吗？”
她耸了耸肩。“我们都得做出牺牲。如果为了确保我们能得救，我必须当全世界的出气筒，那这就是该由我承担的牺牲。”
---
如果她觉得自己是在牺牲自己，那这会让她显得更好一点，还是更糟一点？

Is this the final Stranger Things?
Is this it?
Has it been quite emotional?
I know you can't really tell us how it ends then, but like you reading those scripts and going through it and stuff, was it just.
Well, I haven't read the end.
I know what happens to my character.
Um, because I kind of forced myself into the writers room.
Um, so you broke in and found out?
Yes.
Basically I messaged the directors and thought, can I come over and have a meeting with you?
And then I came over and then there was a whiteboard.
So you've written your own ending?

source_doc:
Melbourne Renegades host Glenn Maxwell and the Melbourne Stars at Marvel Stadium in BBL15 after Usman Khawaja and Brisbane Heat host Sydney Thunder

Sam Harper dominated with 82 not out off 51 balls and Glenn Maxwell recalled the feeling of ball on bat in a subdued innings of 20 not out off 17 balls, which included one massive six. He has not lost his ability and would have enjoyed the chance to spend time in the middle.

The crowd of 42,846 was not given the contest they hoped for as the Stars won the match by eight wickets with 25 balls remaining.

It keeps Melbourne Stars in contention as they break a three-match losing sequence and makes life hard for Melbourne Renegades. Marcus Stoinis bowled well to take 3-33 and was on a hat-trick at one stage while Harper is in great form having hit 356 runs at a strike rate of 159 for the tournament. He was man-of-the-match.

Tom Rogers bounced back with a fast 50 against Melbourne Renegades

But it was all over once Tom Rogers helped himself to 50 off 19 balls to start the innings with an opening partnership of 84 with Harper.

"They outplayed us at the "G so it was nice to get our fifth win," Harper told Fox Cricket.

Most interesting were the comments from the Fox Cricket commentary box where former England captain Michael Vaughan made it clear how disappointed he was with the way the English hierarchy handled a nightclub incident involving Harry Brook in New Zealand before they arrived in Australia for The Ashes.

Melbourne Stars veteran Peter Siddle said "it was a good turnaround" with the win pushing the team back into second spot on the BBL table.

It's starting to heat up with three games remaining for Melbourne Renegades and two matches for Melbourne Stars.

There is still plenty of cricket left this summer so keep tuning in. Thanks for following. Can the Stars finally win the title?
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Simplified translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Simplified grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Chinese, Simplified translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):
hypo_0:
在乌斯曼·哈瓦贾和布里斯班热火主场迎战悉尼雷霆之后，墨尔本叛逆者队将在BBL15于漫威体育场迎战格伦·麦克斯韦领衔的墨尔本星队。

萨姆·哈珀表现抢眼，51球82分保持不败；格伦·麦克斯韦则以17球20分未出局的平淡一局，重新找回了球棒击球的感觉，其中包括一记势大力沉的六分球。他的能力并未消失，而他显然也很享受此次在场上久留的机会。

42,846名观众未能看到他们期待中的激烈较量，最终星队在还剩25球的情况下以8个门柱的优势赢下比赛。

这场胜利让墨尔本星队在终结三连败后继续保有竞争力，同时也让墨尔本叛逆者队的处境更加艰难。马库斯·斯托伊尼斯投球表现出色，拿下3-33，并一度有机会完成帽子戏法；而哈珀则延续火热状态，本届赛事已以159的击球率拿下356分。他也当选本场最佳球员。

汤姆·罗杰斯在对阵墨尔本叛逆者队时强势反弹，迅速拿下50分。

但当汤姆·罗杰斯开局便19球轰下50分，并与哈珀组成84分的首开搭档后，比赛其实已失去悬念。

“他们之前在‘G球场’压制了我们，所以能拿到第五场胜利感觉很好，”哈珀在接受福克斯板球采访时表示。

最引人关注的是福克斯板球解说席上的评论，英格兰前队长迈克尔·沃恩明确表示，他对英格兰管理层在球队抵达澳大利亚参加《灰烬杯》之前，处理哈里·布鲁克在新西兰卷入夜店事件的方式感到非常失望。

墨尔本星队老将彼得·西德尔表示，这场胜利“是一次很好的反弹”，并帮助球队重新升至BBL积分榜第二位。

随着墨尔本叛逆者队还剩三场比赛、墨尔本星队还剩两场比赛，竞争正开始白热化。

这个夏天的板球赛事还有很多内容，敬请继续关注。感谢您的追踪报道。星队最终能否捧起冠军奖杯？
hypo_1:
在乌斯曼·哈瓦贾领衔的布里斯班热火主场迎战悉尼雷霆之后，BBL15将转战漫威体育场，由墨尔本叛逆者主场迎战格伦·麦克斯韦领军的墨尔本星队。

萨姆·哈珀火力全开，51球轰下82分并保持不败；格伦·麦克斯韦则在一局相对平稳的17球20分未出局中，重新找回了击球手感，其中还包括一记势大力沉的六分球。他的能力显然并未减退，而他想必也很享受这次在场上长时间停留的机会。

现场42,846名观众未能等来他们期待中的激烈对抗，墨尔本星队最终在还剩25球的情况下，以8个门柱的优势轻松取胜。

这场胜利让墨尔本星队在终结三连败后继续保有竞争希望，也让墨尔本叛逆者的处境更加艰难。马库斯·斯托伊尼斯投球表现出色，拿下3/33，并一度冲击帽子戏法；哈珀则延续绝佳状态，本届赛事至今已攻下356分，击球率高达159。他也凭借这一表现当选全场最佳。

汤姆·罗杰斯在对阵墨尔本叛逆者的比赛中强势反弹，快速拿下50分。

不过，当汤姆·罗杰斯开局便以19球斩获50分，并与哈珀打出84分的首开搭档后，比赛实际上已经提前失去悬念。

“他们此前在‘G球场’完全压制了我们，所以拿到我们的第五场胜利感觉很棒，”哈珀在接受福克斯板球采访时说。

更引人关注的是福克斯板球解说席上的一番评论。英格兰前队长迈克尔·沃恩明确表示，他对英格兰高层在球队抵达澳大利亚参加《灰烬杯》前，对哈里·布鲁克在新西兰卷入夜店事件的处理方式深感失望。

墨尔本星队老将彼得·西德尔表示，这场胜利“是一次很好的反弹”，并帮助球队重返BBL积分榜第二位。

随着墨尔本叛逆者还剩三场比赛、墨尔本星队还剩两场比赛，争夺正逐渐进入白热化阶段。

这个夏天的板球赛季还有很多精彩内容，敬请继续关注。感谢您的陪伴。星队这次能否最终问鼎冠军？
hypo_2:
在乌斯曼·哈瓦贾领衔的布里斯班热火主场迎战悉尼雷霆之后，BBL15赛季来到漫威体育场，墨尔本叛逆者在此主场迎战由格伦·麦克斯韦领军的墨尔本星队。

萨姆·哈珀表现抢眼，51球82分保持不败；格伦·麦克斯韦则在一局较为克制的17球20分未出局中，重新找回了击球感觉，其中包括一记势大力沉的六分球。他的能力并未消退，而这次得以在场上多待一段时间，对他而言无疑也是一种享受。

42,846名现场观众未能看到他们期待中的激烈较量，墨尔本星队最终在还剩25球的情况下，以8个门柱的优势轻松取胜。

这场胜利让墨尔本星队在终结三连败后继续保有晋级希望，也让墨尔本叛逆者的处境更加艰难。马库斯·斯托伊尼斯投球表现出色，拿下3比33，并一度有望完成帽子戏法；与此同时，哈珀延续火热状态，本届赛事至今已攻下356分，击球率高达159。他也凭借这一表现当选本场最佳球员。

汤姆·罗杰斯在对阵墨尔本叛逆者时强势反弹，快速拿下50分。

不过，当汤姆·罗杰斯开局便19球轰下50分，并与哈珀联手打出84分的首开搭档时，比赛实际上已基本失去悬念。

“他们此前在‘G球场’完全压制了我们，所以拿到我们的第五场胜利感觉很好，”哈珀在接受福克斯板球采访时表示。

更引人关注的是福克斯板球解说席上的评论，英格兰前队长迈克尔·沃恩明确表示，他对英格兰管理层在球队抵达澳大利亚参加《灰烬杯》之前，处理哈里·布鲁克在新西兰卷入夜店事件的方式深感失望。

墨尔本星队老将彼得·西德尔表示，这场胜利“是一次很好的反弹”，并帮助球队重返BBL积分榜第二位。

随着墨尔本叛逆者还剩三场比赛、墨尔本星队还剩两场比赛，竞争正逐渐进入白热化阶段。

这个夏天的板球比赛还有很多精彩内容，敬请继续关注。感谢您的陪伴。星队这一次能否最终夺冠？

这场胜利让墨尔本星队在终结三连败后继续保有竞争希望，也让墨尔本叛逆者的处境更加艰难。马库斯·斯托伊尼斯投球表现出色，拿下3投33失分，并一度有望完成帽子戏法；与此同时，哈珀也延续着极佳状态，本届赛事至今已攻下356分，击球率高达159。他最终当选本场最佳球员。

汤姆·罗杰斯在对阵墨尔本叛逆者的比赛中强势反弹，迅速拿下50分。

但当汤姆·罗杰斯开局便19球轰下半世纪，并与哈珀联手打出84分的首开搭档后，比赛实际上已早早失去悬念。

“他们此前在‘G球场完全压制了我们，所以拿到我们的第五场胜利感觉很好，”哈珀在接受福克斯板球采访时说。

更引人关注的是福克斯板球解说席上的评论。英格兰前队长迈克尔·沃恩明确表示，在球队抵达澳大利亚参加《灰烬杯》之前，英格兰管理层对哈里·布鲁克在新西兰卷入夜店事件的处理方式令他非常失望。

墨尔本星队老将彼得·西德尔表示，这场胜利“是一次很好的反弹”，并帮助球队重返BBL积分榜第二位。

随着墨尔本叛逆者还剩三场比赛、墨尔本星队还剩两场比赛，赛季争夺正逐渐升温。

这个夏天的板球赛事仍有不少看点，敬请继续关注。感谢您的陪伴。墨尔本星队这一次能否终于夺冠？

My fingers feel like frostbite.

@theynege As someone who was aware of dansup (bc of you and some other folks) but hadn't witnessed it happen in real time, this time I witnessed it in real time and it was a piece of work. Polished. Like he's a habitual offender.

@theynege he screenshotted her account and posted it with his "crazy mask lady" comments, when called out he IMMEDIATELY deleted the posts and started posting his bona fides as a "community builder" and all the folks he's worked with and and and wow, isn't he amazing no acknowledgement at all that he - community builder and dude with marginalized identities and all - targeted a disabled racialized woman online for harassment by doing it.
The sniper quality of it was something to behold. He was ready to tell everyone how great he was to cover over basically an attack he knew could bring harm.

@quietmarc @theynege that post was like an ableism hat trick

@theynege 我之前就知道dansup这人（因为你和另外一些人提过），但一直没亲眼见过他现场这么干。这次我是真实时看到了，真是够可以的。手法老练。感觉就像惯犯一样。

那种像狙击手一样的精准和狠劲，真是让人看得发毛。他早就准备好到处吹自己有多了不起，好把这件事——本质上就是一次他明知道可能会造成伤害的攻击——给盖过去。

[
  "Set up and manage a Facebook Store right from your Mambalo dashboard. Forget social sharing. You’re ready for social selling.",
  "Easily add, promote, and sell products, or manage all your Facebook advertising in just a few clicks — right from your Mambalo dashboard.",
  "Convert window shoppers to paying customers with Facebook remarketing. With a few clicks, we’ll create hyper-targeted ads to remind your customers about products they considered but didn’t buy.",
  "Sell everywhere",
  "Set up and manage a Facebook store right from your Mambalo dashboard. Forget social sharing. You’re ready for social selling.",
  "Worried about the extra management? Mambalo automatically syncs your product information from your online store with Facebook, so any changes you make will instantly appear in your Facebook ecommerce store. Do it once and forget it.",
  "Advertising your Facebook store — made easy",
  "The Facebook Pixel makes advertising on Facebook much more effective. Easily market to your ideal audiences based on the actions they have taken in your online store and track their conversions. Not only do you know exactly who you’re advertising to, but you also have a better understanding of how your ads are performing. All in all, you can make your messaging more powerful, leading to a better return on your advertising dollars.",
  "Remarket. To everyone who visits your site, or just to people who visit specific pages or take specific actions.",
  "Streamlined shipping and taxes: Integrates with major carriers such as USPS, UPS, FedEx, and many others internationally to automatically calculate shipping rates.",
  "WordPress e-commerce Capabilities: Add your online store to WordPress and showcase the same products, prices, and descriptions on your Facebook store as your WordPress storefront or any other site builder like Weebly, Wix, and Adobe Muse.",
  "E-commerce mobile apps: With Mambalo’s free iOS and Android apps, you can manage sales, track inventory, and accept online payments wherever you are.",
  "PCI DSS validated level 1 service: Provides 55+ payment options and secure HTTPS checkout capabilities to ensure you comply with PCI DSS Level 1 requirements.",
  "Is it possible to migrate my store from WooCommerce to Facebook with Mambalo?",
  "I am still confused and need extra help with the Mambalo Facebook commerce app. What should I do?",
  "Don't forget about our Knowledge Base, either. If you want to learn about Mambalo basics, how to manage your Mambalo Facebook store, and other Mambalo Facebook commerce app topics, our Knowledge Base may prove to be a great resource.",
  "The Mambalo team is happy to help you too. Feel free to send us a message at any time, and we will respond as soon as possible.",
  "Google Smart Shopping takes your products beyond Google search to help you advertise across Shopping, YouTube, Gmail, and the Google Display Network.",
  "Maximize sales without the guesswork",
]

hypo_0: ["直接在您的 Mambalo 控制面板中设置和管理 Facebook 商店。忘掉社交分享吧。您已准备好开启社交销售。","轻松添加、推广和销售产品，或只需点击几下即可管理您的所有 Facebook 广告——一切都可直接在您的 Mambalo 控制面板中完成。","通过 Facebook 再营销，将只看不买的访客转化为付费客户。只需点击几下，我们就能创建高度精准的广告，提醒您的客户关注他们曾考虑但未购买的产品。","随处销售","直接在您的 Mambalo 控制面板中设置和管理 Facebook 商店。忘掉社交分享吧。您已准备好开启社交销售。","担心额外的管理工作？Mambalo 会自动将您在线商店中的产品信息与 Facebook 同步，因此您所做的任何更改都会立即显示在您的 Facebook 电商商店中。设置一次，省心无忧。","轻松为您的 Facebook 商店投放广告","Facebook Pixel 可让您在 Facebook 上投放广告更加高效。您可以根据用户在您的在线商店中采取的操作，轻松向理想受众进行营销，并跟踪他们的转化情况。这样一来，您不仅清楚广告投放给了谁，还能更好地了解广告效果。总之，您可以让营销信息更有力，从而提高广告投入回报率。","再营销。面向所有访问您网站的人，或仅面向访问特定页面或执行特定操作的人。","简化的配送和税费：集成 USPS、UPS、FedEx 以及许多其他国际承运商，可自动计算运费。","WordPress 电商功能：将您的在线商店添加到 WordPress，并在您的 Facebook 商店中展示与您的 WordPress 店面或 Weebly、Wix、Adobe Muse 等其他建站工具网站相同的产品、价格和描述。","电商移动应用：借助 Mambalo 免费的 iOS 和 Android 应用，无论您身在何处，都可以管理销售、跟踪库存并接受在线付款。","通过 PCI DSS 一级验证的服务：提供 55+ 种支付方式和安全的 HTTPS 结账功能，确保您符合 PCI DSS 一级要求。","是否可以使用 Mambalo 将我的商店从 WooCommerce 迁移到 Facebook？","我还是有些困惑，需要有关 Mambalo Facebook 电商应用的额外帮助。我该怎么做？","也别忘了我们的知识库。如果您想了解 Mambalo 基础知识、如何管理您的 Mambalo Facebook 商店，以及其他 Mambalo Facebook 电商应用相关主题，我们的知识库可能会是非常有价值的资源。","Mambalo 团队也很乐意为您提供帮助。欢迎随时给我们发送消息，我们会尽快回复。","Google 智能购物可让您的产品突破 Google 搜索范围，帮助您在购物广告、YouTube、Gmail 和 Google 展示广告网络上进行推广。","无需盲目摸索，最大化销售额"]

source_doc:
We're not renewing your contract.
We've wasted ten years on this already.
But hey, I managed to talk them into allowing you to continue to research on this IP in your own time.
But just remember, we own the rights.
Once you crack it, we still want this to work.
Need this to work.
But I did warn you about this last year.
instruction: You are a professional Chinese, Simplified translator, tasked with providing translations suitable for use in Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans). Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Simplified grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Chinese, Simplified translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):

source_doc:
She talked about how impossible it is to be a woman in today's society.
She spoke for over two minutes without being interrupted by a single man, saying things like, you have to be a boss, but you can't be mean.
You have to be thin but not too thin.
You have to never get old, never be rude, never show up.
Oh, sorry.
Our male director is telling me I need to wrap it up here to present America with her.
To see her award.
Is the woman that she delivered that speech to.
Please welcome Margot Robbie.

她谈到了在当今社会做女人是多么不可能的一件事。
她一口气讲了两分多钟，中间没有一个男人打断她，说什么你得像个老板，但又不能显得刻薄。
你得瘦，但又不能太瘦。
你绝不能变老，绝不能无礼，绝不能出现。
哦，抱歉。
我们的男导演在告诉我，我得在这里收尾了，好向America介绍她。
让她看看她的奖项。
她发表那段演讲时面对的那位女士就是America。
请欢迎玛格特·罗比。

她一连讲了两分多钟，期间没有一个男人打断她，说的都是这样的话：你得有领导力，但又不能显得刻薄。
你得瘦，但又不能太瘦。

哦，抱歉。
我们的男导演正在提醒我，我得赶紧收尾，好把America介绍出来。
来为她颁奖的，
正是她当时发表那段演讲时面对的那位女性。
让我们欢迎玛格特·罗比。

source_doc:
Local stable out to cash in at Coffs with four contenders

Local trainer Noel Mayfield-Smith is hoping to have a lucrative day at Sunday's Coffs Harbour meeting with four runners stepping out for the stable on the six-race card.

The Group 1-winning horseman will start his day in the second event of the day when Ausbred Yahoo contests the Komatsu Country Boosted Benchmark 58 Handicap (1605m) with two-kilogram claiming apprentice Ella Drew taking the ride.

Racing returns to Coffs Harbour on Sunday.

Ausbred Yahoo has been racing in good form with a third placing at Kempsey three starts ago being followed by two successive seconds at Coffs Harbour, the latest when beaten by Sunday's rival Caledonian.

Mayfield-Smith links with another apprentice, three-kilogram claimer Leanne Boyd, when Never Island starts in the Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks F&M Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

A winner of three of her 15 starts, Never Island will carry 59.5 kilograms after Boyd's allowance. Never Island was beaten less than a length when second behind Montgomery at Grafton and backed that up with a last-start fifth at Coffs Harbour behind In The Fine Print when again beaten less than a length.

Raymond Spokes takes the ride on the Mayfield-Smith-prepared Monte Cruise in the O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82 Handicap (1205m).

Monte Cruise is also a three-time winner from just the nine starts. She hasn't raced since July when finishing last of eight at Eagle Farm and has had two trials at this track in preparation for her return, finishing second behind Saturday's Wyong winner Petticoat before winning the latest of them.

Mayfield-Smith rounds out the day when he again links with Boyd when she rides Cardsharp in the Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58 Handicap (1305m).

Your goal is to accurately convey the meaning and nuances of the original text while adhering to Chinese, Simplified grammar and vocabulary and ensuring that the translation is natural. The original text is a news article. Ensure the translation is formal and consistent with journalistic standards. Produce only the Chinese, Simplified translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):
hypo_0:
本地马房携四匹参赛马出击科夫斯，力争丰厚奖金

本地练马师诺埃尔·梅菲尔德-史密斯希望在周日科夫斯港赛马会迎来收获颇丰的一天，这家马房将在当天六场赛事中派出四匹赛驹上阵。

这位曾赢得一级赛的练马师将在当天第二场比赛开启征程，届时Ausbred Yahoo将出战小松乡村加码Benchmark 58让赛（1605米），由减磅2公斤的见习骑师埃拉·德鲁策骑。

赛马将于周日重返科夫斯港。

Ausbred Yahoo近期状态不俗，三战前在肯普西获得季军，随后又在科夫斯港连续两场跑获亚军，最近一次正是不敌周日同场对手Caledonian。

在Insurance Advisernet Australia Pink Silks雌马及母马Benchmark 58让赛（1305米）中，梅菲尔德-史密斯将与另一位见习骑师、减磅3公斤的莉安妮·博伊德合作，由Never Island出赛。

Never Island在15次出赛中赢得3场胜利，在享受博伊德减磅后将负重59.5公斤。她此前在格拉夫顿仅以不足一个马位之差屈居Montgomery之后获得亚军，随后在科夫斯港上仗再度以不足一个马位之差不敌In The Fine Print，获得第五名。

由梅菲尔德-史密斯训练的Monte Cruise将在O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82让赛（1205米）中由雷蒙德·斯波克斯执缰。

Monte Cruise同样在仅9次出赛中取得3场头马。她自7月在鹰农场八驹竞逐中垫底后便未再上阵，为此次复出已在该赛场进行两场试闸，先是在周六怀昂赢家Petticoat之后跑获第二，随后赢下最近一次试闸。

梅菲尔德-史密斯将在当天最后一匹参赛马出场时再度与博伊德联手，由她策骑Cardsharp出战Key Community Group阉马、公马及雌马Benchmark 58让赛（1305米）。p>

在O'Brien Plumbing Relining Wayne Glenn Pink Silks Cup Benchmark 82让赛（1205米）中，梅菲尔德-史密斯训练的Monte Cruise将由雷蒙德·斯波克斯执缰。

Monte Cruise同样仅在9次出赛中便取得3场头马。她自7月在鹰农场一场八驹参赛的比赛中垫底之后便未再出赛。为此次复出，她已在这条赛道完成两次试闸，先是在周六怀昂冠军Petticoat之后跑获第二，随后又在最近一次试闸中取胜。

梅菲尔德-史密斯当天最后一匹上阵的马将是Cardsharp，届时他将再次与博伊德合作，由后者在Key Community Group C,G&E Benchmark 58让赛（1305米）中策骑出赛。

I had them for the very first time when I last came to Portugal, and I was obsessed.
I ate about 50 of these.
Probably no exaggeration.
I ate so many of these when I was when I was last here.
And then I tried them in like other countries afterwards.
And they never hit the same.
They never hit the same.
So I'm having these again in Portugal.
Let's try them.

source_doc:
I'm doing a eekly 1hr meeting where I'm going over with a director of engineering my soap box on managing a product management organization and actually it's coming out to be a pretty good episodic thing

Topics have been
- different types of product managers and the basic skill sets in developing requirements
- how product managers ensure an ongoing cadence for an engineering team
- dealing with product managers with varying backgrounds (engineering, data analyst, operational SME, consulting etc)
what's been fun is that this Director and I worked at a previous company with product managers that I didn't manage and I'm able to reference "hey remember that person? that person was awesome and here's why."

so in various email chains and slack threads I'll forward them to said director (if he's already not in there) and be like "ok a GOOD product manager would do THIS" and a "BAD product maanger would do THAT" rememember when so and so did THIS? that was good.

hypo_0:
我每周都会开一个1小时的会，跟一位工程总监聊我那套关于怎么管理产品管理组织的心得，结果还真慢慢变成了一个挺不错的系列内容

聊过的话题有
- 不同类型的产品经理，以及在需求梳理上需要具备的基本技能
- 产品经理怎么确保工程团队持续保持稳定节奏
- 怎么应对背景各不相同的产品经理（工程、数据分析师、业务运营领域专家、咨询等）
有意思的是，这位总监和我之前在同一家公司共事过，当时有些产品经理并不是我来管的，所以我现在还能拿他们举例：“哎，还记得那个人吗？那人真的很强，原因是这个。”

所以在各种邮件来回和 Slack 讨论串里，我就会把这些转给那位总监（如果他本来没在里面的话），然后说“好产品经理会这么做”，而“差产品经理会那么做”——还记得某某当时做过这件事吗？那就做得很好。

我现在每周都会和一位工程总监开一个1小时的会，跟他聊我那套关于怎么管理产品管理团队的“个人理论”，结果居然慢慢变成了一个挺不错的系列分享。

聊过的话题有
- 不同类型的产品经理，以及把需求梳理和落地所需要的基础能力
- 产品经理怎么确保工程团队能持续保持稳定节奏
- 怎么带背景各不相同的产品经理（工程、数据分析、运营领域专家、咨询等等）
最好玩的是，这位总监和我之前在同一家公司一起共事过，当时也接触过一些不是我直接管理的产品经理，所以我现在还能随时拿他们举例：“诶，你还记得那个人吗？那个人真的很强，原因就是这个。”

所以在各种邮件来回和 Slack 讨论串里，我都会把内容转给那位总监（如果他本来不在里面的话），然后直接说：“好产品经理会这么做”，而“差产品经理会那么做”。还记得某某当时就是这么做的吗？那个就做得很对。

source_doc:
:redpanda: sometimes people will ask us like "what if you got a publisher for [game] wouldn't that be wicked?" but the problem is that all that would have to go through our game director, Ashe, who's said she wont speak to any publisher who doesn't address her as Ashe
the second she gets "Jess" the deal ends

:redpanda: and in a world where like, not even the AI slop publishers sending AI emails, but the people who have been flat out rude and some of them like, you could *feel* the misogyny dripping off their email, we're not really interested in talking to any of them lol

:redpanda: (I will shout out the publishers who have reached out to us though who have been like "here's some of the games we've published" and, out of their catalog, they picked out exclusively furry games. at least they did their homework)

:redpanda: anyways if you ever were like "I don't understand why Blobun isn't on switch? it'd be a perfect fit" that's why, and we can't afford the devkit and version of gamemaker that does that export, so yea you gotta go steam deck (or x86-ARM converter on those anbernics) if you want it on the go

她这边只要一看到“Jess”，合作当场结束

:redpanda: 而且在这么个世界里，别说那些连 AI 垃圾邮件发行商都在发 AI 邮件了，就连有些真人都直接很没礼貌，其中一些邮件你甚至能感觉到厌女味都快从字里行间滴下来了，我们是真的完全没兴趣跟他们聊 lol

:redpanda: （不过我还是要夸一下那些联系过我们的发行商，他们会说“这是我们发行过的一些游戏”，然后从他们的目录里挑出来给我们的全是兽人游戏。至少功课是做了）

source_doc:
Thank you, Malcolm.
Not at all, Mr. Dreiser.
Tell Paul I said goodbye.
I will.
What are you sniffling about, Theodore?
I'm not sniffling.
Look here, son, I'm tired of having you mope around because Paul's going away to school.
You should be happy that your brother's going to be a minister.
I am happy.

The original text is automatically transcribed from spoken language and can contain errors. Maintain the flow and colloquial style of the speaker in the translation. Do not include non-linguistic sounds (e.g. laughter, groans, hesitation sounds, etc.), but do include interjections. If a word is interrupted, either guess the full word if possible or otherwise omit it. Keep foreign words as they are when translating. Produce only the Chinese, Simplified translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Output the text such that each sentence is on a separate line. We're very high up.
Wow.
These views are definitely amazing.
We're definitely very high up.
So if you're scared of heights, this is maybe not the thing to do for you.
If you see where the City Hall is now, we are definitely much higher up than the previous spot.
I guess if you get really tired on the way or something, start feeling bad.
Maybe you could only climb to the first like outside area because that's already quite nice.
And yeah.
If not, then you get to come all the way up here.

source_doc:
"An utterly miserable day": Kempton Park meeting marred by death of three horses

The Lanzarote Hurdle card at Kempton Park was marred by the death of three horses, including the Grade One-winning Kalif Du Berlais, whose loss Paul Nicholls described as "a big kick in the teeth" and a "sad day."

Kalif Du Berlais - whose ownership group includes Sir Alex Ferguson - unseated Harry Cobden in the four-runner Coral Silviniaco Conti Chase and landed lame, with the broken shoulder he sustained proving untreatable and he was euthanised by the veterinary team on Saturday.

Nicholls said: "It's a sad day when you lose horses like that, it's hard on the whole team. It's a big kick in the teeth for everyone, the owners, the poor girl who looks after him - you hate to see that happen. He was just showing his class today, he jumped and travelled well and sadly now he will never be able to show the potential we thought he had.

"I can say as much as I like, but it's just a shame for the whole team. Harry was extremely upset and is missing his ride in the last as he doesn't feel great about it. He's a big, bold horse who attacks his fences and those horses, when they do that, can end up having a bad fall.

"He was enthusiastic today and travelling beautifully and we'll never know where we would have ended up, we've always had a lot of faith in him. These things happen, sadly, and we'll have to try to pick ourselves up and move forward. These horses get the best of everything, there's not much you can say to make it better at this point.

"It never gets any easier when these things happen and it's a big old blow."

In the Coral Daily Rewards Shaker Handicap Chase, Jonjo and AJ O'Neill's Peso was pulled up on the flat with an injury that could not be treated, leaving racecourse vets with no choice but to euthanise him.

Harry Derham saddled Wertpol for the juvenile hurdle and the horse looked to be running a huge race before falling at the last and sustaining a life-ending injury. Derham said on his X account: "An utterly miserable day at Kempton Park today losing Wertpol who we only had the good fortune of having in our yard for a short period of time.

"It's a sad day when you lose horses like that, it's hard on the whole team. It's a big kick in the teeth for everyone," said Paul Nicholls. Photograph: Alan Crowhurst/Getty Images

"He was a bright talent who was fresh and happy doing his work every day, often playing around and expressing himself. He loved his job and I am so sad for his Heart Of The South syndicate, who are the most wonderful group of people. Racing can at times be a painful sport and today has been a tough day for a number of connections. A day to forget."

A spokesperson for Kempton Park said: "All of us at Kempton Park care deeply about the welfare of all racehorses, as do the thousands of racing staff who provide them with world-class levels of care at home every day. Our heartfelt condolences are with the connections of all three horses."

Produce only the Chinese, Simplified translation, without any additional explanations or commentary. Maintain the HTML formatting of the original source text. Please translate the following text into Chinese, Simplified (zho_Hans):
hypo_0:
“无比悲惨的一天”：肯普顿公园赛马会因三匹赛马死亡蒙上阴影

肯普顿公园举行的兰萨罗特跨栏赛日因三匹赛马死亡而蒙上阴影，其中包括一级赛冠军卡利夫·迪贝莱。保罗·尼科尔斯将其离世形容为“沉重打击”以及“悲伤的一天”。

卡利夫·迪贝莱——其马主团队中包括亚历克斯·弗格森爵士——在仅有四匹马参赛的Coral Silviniaco Conti Chase比赛中将哈里·科布登甩下马背，落地后跛行，所受肩部骨折伤势无法治疗，最终于周六由兽医团队实施安乐死。

尼科尔斯表示：“当你失去这样的马匹时，这是悲伤的一天，这对整个团队都是沉重打击。这对每个人、马主、照料它的那位可怜女孩来说，都是沉重打击——你绝不愿看到这种事情发生。它今天刚刚展现出自己的实力，跳跃和行进状态都很好，遗憾的是，如今它将再也无法展现我们原以为它具备的潜力。

“我说再多也没有用，这对整个团队来说都令人遗憾。哈里非常难过，因此缺席了最后一场比赛的骑乘，因为他对此感觉很不好。它是一匹高大、勇猛、过障积极的马，而这样的马一旦出事，就可能遭遇严重摔倒。

“它今天斗志很高，行进状态极佳，我们永远无法知道最终本会取得怎样的结果，我们一直对它充满信心。遗憾的是，这样的事情确实会发生，我们只能努力振作起来，继续向前。这些马享有最好的一切，到了这个时候，说什么都难以让情况变得好一些。

“这种事情发生时，从来不会变得更容易接受，这始终是一次沉重打击。”

在Coral Daily Rewards Shaker让磅追逐赛中，乔恩乔与AJ·奥尼尔麾下的佩索在直道上因伤退赛，由于伤势无法治疗，赛场兽医别无选择，只能对其实施安乐死。

哈里·德勒姆为幼马跨栏赛派出了韦特波尔，这匹马在比赛中原本看起来表现极为出色，却在最后一个障碍处摔倒并遭受致命伤。德勒姆在其X账号上写道：“今天在肯普顿公园是无比悲惨的一天，我们失去了韦特波尔，而它来到我们马房的时间其实并不长。

“当你失去这样的马匹时，这是悲伤的一天，这对整个团队都是沉重打击。这对每个人来说都是沉重打击，”保罗·尼科尔斯说。图片：Alan Crowhurst/Getty Images

“它是一匹才华出众的好马，每天训练时都精神焕发、状态愉快，常常嬉戏打闹，展现天性。它热爱自己的工作，我也为它所属的Heart Of The South联合马主团体感到无比难过，他们是一群非常好的人。赛马有时是一项令人痛苦的运动，而今天对不少相关人士来说都是艰难的一天。这是应该被遗忘的一天。”

肯普顿公园一位发言人表示：“我们肯普顿公园的所有人都非常重视所有赛马的福祉，数以千计的赛马从业人员也是如此，他们每天都在马房中为这些赛马提供世界一流的照料。我们向这三匹赛马的所有相关人士致以诚挚慰问。”

“我说再多也无济于事，这对整个团队来说都非常令人惋惜。哈里非常难过，因此将缺席最后一场比赛的策骑，因为他心里实在不好受。它是一匹高大、勇猛、过障十分主动的马，而这种马在如此冲击障碍时，可能会摔得很重。

“它今天斗志十足，跑得也非常流畅，而我们永远不会知道它原本可能取得怎样的结果。我们一直对它抱有很大信心。遗憾的是，这种事情确实会发生，我们只能尽力振作起来，继续向前。这些马已经享受到最好的一切，到了这个时候，实在没有什么话能让情况变得好一些。

“这种事情发生时，永远不会更容易承受，这始终是一次沉重打击。”

在Coral Daily Rewards Shaker让磅追逐赛中，乔恩乔和AJ·奥尼尔麾下的佩索在直道上因伤被拉停。由于伤势无法治疗，赛场兽医别无选择，只能对其实施安乐死。

哈里·德勒姆为幼马跨栏赛派出了韦特波尔，这匹马原本看起来正跑出一场极为出色的比赛，却在最后一道障碍前摔倒并遭受致命伤。德勒姆在其X账号上写道：“今天的肯普顿公园是无比惨痛的一天，我们失去了韦特波尔，而它来到我们马房的时间其实并不长，我们只是短暂地有幸拥有过它。

“失去这样一匹马，是令人悲伤的一天，这对整个团队来说都很艰难。这对所有人来说都是沉重打击，”保罗·尼科尔斯说。图片：Alan Crowhurst/Getty Images

“它是一匹天赋出众的好马，每天训练时都精神饱满、心情愉快，常常嬉戏玩闹，展现自己的个性。它热爱自己的工作，我也为它所属的‘南方之心’联合马主团体感到非常难过，他们是一群非常出色的人。赛马有时会是一项令人痛苦的运动，而今天对不少相关人士来说都是艰难的一天。这是应该被遗忘的一天。”

肯普顿公园一位发言人表示：“我们肯普顿公园的所有人都非常重视所有赛马的福祉，数以千计的赛马从业人员也是如此，他们每天都在马房中为这些赛马提供世界一流的照料。我们向这三匹赛马的所有相关人士致以最诚挚的慰问。”

source_doc:
@hacks4pancakes What do you think is actually going on?
Confused? Anxious? Executive Dysfunction? Unrealistic? Bone idle?
(I'm NOT confusing ND with idleness in my internal ontology here, but I wonder if either might be contributing...)

@hacks4pancakes @DamonHD Foe emigration at least, I can imagine myself saying “oh I’m so jealous, I would LOVE to do that” when the truth is there are internal or external reasons why I wouldn’t/couldn’t and someone offering to help me with the logistics wouldn’t change that so I politely decline.

@darryl @hacks4pancakes The grown-up way to politely decline would be "I got ahead of myself: I cannot do that for other reasons much as I'd like to", not brushing it off as a diary issue!

hypo_0:
@hacks4pancakes 你觉得这到底是怎么回事？
困惑？焦虑？执行功能障碍？不切实际？纯粹就是懒？
（我这里并不是在我自己的内在分类里把ND和懒惰混为一谈，但我在想，会不会这两者里有哪个也在起作用……）

@hacks4pancakes @DamonHD 至少说到移民这事，我能想象自己会说“啊我太羡慕了，我超想这么做”，但事实是，出于一些内在或外在的原因，我并不会/也做不到，而就算有人愿意帮我处理这些后勤安排，也改变不了这一点，所以我会礼貌地拒绝。

@darryl @hacks4pancakes 一个成熟的大人该有的礼貌拒绝方式应该是：“我有点太想当然了：虽然我很想，但因为别的原因我没法那么做”，而不是把这轻描淡写地说成只是日程安排的问题！

@darryl @hacks4pancakes 一个成熟的大人该有的礼貌拒绝方式会是：“是我刚刚想得太超前了：虽然我很想，但因为别的原因我做不到”，而不是轻轻带过，说成只是日程安排的问题！

Darling?

source_doc:
@Maker_of_Things
Is there any bruising or swelling? If it’s swelling then let the practice know and keep an eye on it.
Assuming she took it from the veins around the elbow, theres a chance she went too deep and hit the back wall of the vein, and an underlying tendon then bruised it on the way out. All depends on technique and equipment. I could never get the hang of a fixed needle draw but was a deft hand at a butterfly draw, you could be much kinder.
Hope it’s eased now.

@tempusfelix
Yeah, from my elbow. It is still sore, but getting better. No bruising or bleeding though.

@Maker_of_Things
Good. She may well have been too deep so remember if they’re not urgent, you can often ask for a specific practitioner if your surgery allows it. For example I like the sister at mine, she’s so smooth.

hypo_0:
@Maker_of_Things
有淤青或者肿胀吗？如果是肿了，那就告诉诊所一声，并且多留意一下。
如果她是从肘部周围的静脉抽的血，那有可能是扎得太深了，碰到了静脉后壁，下面的肌腱在拔出来的时候又给碰伤了。这个很看手法和器材。我一直不太会用直针抽血，但用蝴蝶针就很顺手，会温和很多。
希望现在已经缓解了。

@tempusfelix
对，是从我手肘那边抽的。现在还是会疼，不过在慢慢好转。倒是没有淤青或者出血。

@Maker_of_Things
那就好。她很可能确实扎得太深了，所以记住，如果不是急事，而且你们诊所允许的话，通常可以要求指定某位操作人员。比如我就喜欢我那边的护士长，她手法特别稳。

source_doc:
Ryan, if you ever feel like you're losing hope and you need a little Christmas miracle, just dial S for Santa.
Ryan, grandma needs you.
Okay, Alana.
I'll be back.
Santa.
It's one thing to fill his head with nonsense about the North Pole, but dial S for Santa.
